subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that hath been sent down in truth from the presence of One mighty and powerful, wherein the measures of the Cause have been ordained by a most holy and exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز قدیرا و قدر فیه مقادیر الامر من قلم قدس منیعا
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Word of God and human limitations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
